title: rosa × dumetorum f. peracuta
intro: Rosa × dumetorum f. peracuta is a hybrid rose species that belongs to the family Rosaceae, characterized by its thorny stems and fragrant flowers. The medicinal properties of Rosa × dumetorum f. peracuta lie in its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. This plant is believed to have health benefits such as relieving symptoms of menopausal hot flashes and improving cardiovascular health. Rosa × dumetorum f. peracuta can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
